faq.question: How does a clinic landing page differ from a regular website?
faq.answer: A landing page is a single page with one goal: book the patient. Ideal for advertising campaigns.

faq.question: Can I create multiple landing pages for different services?
faq.answer: Yes, create separate landing pages for each promotion or clinic department.

faq.question: How do I connect analytics to the landing page?
faq.answer: Insert Yandex.Metrica or Google Analytics code in settings — Promto supports all popular systems.

faq.question: How quickly can I launch a landing page for an urgent promotion?
faq.answer: Landing page ready in 5 minutes. Describe the promotion — AI creates a full page immediately.

faq.question: Can I add a countdown timer?
faq.answer: Yes, the timer is a built-in block in Promto. Set the promotion end date and it counts down automatically.

faq.question: What is the cost of a clinic landing page?
faq.answer: Creation is free. Publishing on your own domain and additional features on paid plans.
